scripts.dev: npm run sync:version && npm run desktop:dev
scripts.build: npm run sync:version && npm run build --workspace @taptap/server && npm run build --workspace @taptap/web
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build && npm run sync:version && npm run prepare:desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @taptap/server && npm run typecheck --workspace @taptap/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @taptap/server && npm run lint --workspace @taptap/web
